title: 1944 Cuba–Florida hurricane rainfall
description: Rainfall totals associated with a hurricane in October 1944 that struck Florida and the Southeastern United States.

title: Hurricane Thirteen surface analysis 1944 Oct 21 0630z
description: Surface weather analysis of the 1944 Cuba–Florida hurricane's remnants over Chesapeake Bay on October 21, 1944, at 2:30 a.m. Eastern War Time.
